summary: Start, track, and stop dev services with port discipline.

subcommands.name: start
subcommands.summary: Start a recipe (config/recipes/<recipe>.json) detached, tracked in the registry.

subcommands.name: stop
subcommands.summary: Stop one service, or every running service.

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.summary: Print a service's full record plus a live liveness probe.
